commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps service-managed Linux child and Codex app-server launches in user systemd scopes, changes cron reservation/top-off/finalization behavior, starts cron before post-ready maintenance completes, and routes stale Codex thread-binding fallback through Codex OAuth.

PR surface: Source +217, Tests +453. Total +670 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence real reproduction is provided. The source paths and regression tests are clear, but the PR body does not show a current-main failure or after-fix run in a real service-managed gateway.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are missing real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of default worker-scope and auth-provider behavior, not a narrow automated repair.
